name: Kim
text: We are honored to be guest in this lovely home. Absolutely stunning and perfect location. We fell in love with this house. You thought of everything we needed for well over 5 days, its greatly appreciated.

name: Torres's
text: Your place is lovely. Thank you for thinking of everything.

name: Beth
text: Thank you for providing a welcoming beautiful home. We loved it. Took lots of pictures for inspiration in my upcoming kitchen update.

name: Patrick
text: Everything was great. Our two year old really enjoyed the toys you have here.

name: Helman's
text: Very nice home, comfortable, well decorated and renovated. Bathroom was a little small, loved the fan pulls, flowers, noise machine accents.

name: Carson
text: Thank you!

name: Norm
text: The rental is spacious, conveniently located, well-equipped, comfortable and even nicely decorated. We were happy to be here and hope to return. Thank you!

name: Ashley
text: Your place is fantastic & in the perfect location!

name: Larry
text: Your home is very nice. The fresh flowers are a nice touch. The location is great. Close to the Park.

name: Donna
text: Your home is beautiful the Kitchen is charming. Loved the flowers.

name: Marcus
text: Your place is great. Thanks so much. Loved Savannah

name: Alicia
text: Thank you for providing everything to enjoy. We had a lovely stay. The flowers inside & out were a sight for our sore, frozen eyes!

name: Cyndi
text: Thank you for allowing us to share your sweet little home. We most definitely enjoyed our visit to Savannah.

name: Paula
text: You have a beautiful home, it is the best and our favorite of all the Airbnb we have stayed in. (five star)

name: Gay
text: Thank you for providing us with such a lovely place to call home. All of the amenities were top-notch!

name: Reid
text: Loved your home, perfect for our trip.

name: Stef
text: Thank you so much for providing a comfortable and cozy home for us to return to each day!

name: Loreen
text: Thank you sooo much. The house is beautiful and we had the best time.

name: Veronica
text: Thank you for a beautiful and comfortable stay. Loved the details... and all the goodies for coffee. Will hopefully stay here again.

name: Mike
text: Home away from home feel! Your restoration is lovely. Thank you.

name: Ceci
text: THANK YOU! Good spot!

name: Amy
text: Thank you for a lovely, clean place we could stay in!

name: Aubrey
text: The place is fantastic.

name: Erin
text: The house and location was perfect.

name: Stephanie
text: We loved our time in Savannah. Thank you for providing a great place to stay. We loved the flowers.

name: Matt
text: Thanks for the clean hospitality. We thoroughly enjoyed the house and location.

name: Danielle
text: Cozy and Comfortable - attractive

name: Harley's
text: Nice House.

name: Heather
text: We love your home! So comfortable and well appointed. We so enjoyed our stay and will be back when its warmer.

name: Jenny
text: Such a charming Airbnb! We loved the recommendations you left! Tacos and Tequila 10/10 and cotton was such a peaceful breakfast spot! Also the Ghost tour gave us on insite on the city and more ideas for exploring.

name: Sarah
text: Your home is beautiful. The little touch of fresh flowers was awesome. The sound machines were great.

name: Robert
text: Your home is perfect! Thanks for a wonderful stay from first time visitors to Savannah.

name: Dan
text: Thank you! We love your home!

name: Ken
text: Very impressed with our BNB. There wasn't one thing we needed that wasn't here.

name: Mike
text: What a lovely place! So comfortable, and with everything one could need! Definitely would return.

name: Caitlyn
text: We had a great time!

name: Barbara
text: Your home is so well cared for, beautifully decorated and thoughtfully stocked, homey and comfortable.

name: Cheri
text: Thank you for a beautiful and clean home.

name: Paul
text: Lovely home in a perfect location.

name: Nick
text: Beautiful home with everything we needed. Great location - very walkable! We will definitely be staying here for our next trip to Savannah.

name: Bob
text: Lovely home, especially loved having two condos! My son and granddaughter from Atlanta joined us.

name: Jessica
text: Gorgeous location and house!

name: Emilie
text: Thank you! Fabulous house, the fresh flowers were a great touch.

name: Allison
text: Thank you for going above and beyond with the amenities. i.e fresh flowers, white noise machine, & coffee bar!

name: Isa
text: Thank you so much, the place is gorg-tastic!! We took good care of her.

name: Nettie
text: Lovely place. Fully equipped and more. Great 10 out of 10.

name: Ogden's
text: Thank you for the beautiful accommodations, quick responses, and tips offered! We had a great trip and can't wait to return!

name: Zach
text: Thank you so much for letting us enjoy your very clean and lovely home. We would definitely book again.

name: Beth
text: Lovely place, great location, comfy and cozy!

name: Jared
text: We had a wonderful stay!

name: Ed
text: Very Comfortable; clean; wonderful shower. Firm Mattress. & pillows. We would enjoy another stay.

name: Kaylor
text: What a beautiful home, very well kept, fully stocked, so pleasant. It is located so conveniently to everything. The picnic backet was amazing it added such a special treat.

name: West's
text: Your place is beautiful! It's in a great location, so clean, wonderfully stocked too! We loved our welcome bag. I especially liked the card with a drawing of the house.

name: Scott's
text: Beautiful place! Tastefully decorated with many conveniences. The fresh flowers were a nice touch. I enjoyed my stay. p.s. close to everything!

name: Angela
text: This was a fabulous and comfortable stay. Your taste in decor and style are superb. Look forward to coming again.

name: Sanchez's
text: Thank you for sharing your home. We had a great time in Savannah. Cant wait to return.

name: Katlynn
text: Everything was perfect! Clean, organized, we had everything we needed, it was great.

name: Dale
text: The Airbnb was very nice - perfect location, very comfortable, super clean, thank you for the Keurig update!

name: Dayton
text: Thank you so much for the southern hospitality! We had such an amazing trip and you/your home were a huge part of that.

name: Stratton
text: Cozy, inviting house with all the necessary amenities plus local flavored reading peppered throughout; all of this so close to Savannah's main attractions - great location

name: Karen
text: Your Airbnb was perfect for us! Plenty of space, very comfortable and almost everything we could possibly need but could use a Keurig.

name: Denise
text: The house is well supplied - has everything we could need and more! Great location with plenty of entertainment within walking distance. Love the coffee bar and double shower heads.

name: Scott
text: Loved the neighborhood!

name: Gretchen
text: What an adorable place! So easy. Everything we would/could need. Great work. Such a great spot.

name: Sampson's
text: Thank you so much for providing a lovely stay for my wife and I. The Feel, look, and warmth of the home brought in all of the beauty of Savannah.

name: Alisha
text: Thank You!

name: Calvin
text: Thank you for such a warm and lovely space!

name: Samuel
text: Thank you for such a sweet, comfy stay.

name: Courtney
text: Thank you for creating such a beautiful restful place. It evokes all the southern charm that Savannah is famous for. Very thoughtful throughout.

name: Shelly
text: We loved our stay in your beautiful historic home. So quiet and peaceful.

name: Girls
text: Thank you so much!! We enjoyed the historic yet chic look of the floral. Perfect amenities and location.

name: Jane
text: Thanks for all the little touches that made us feel at home.

name: Kyle
text: Great home! Loved fresh flowers.

name: Courtney
text: We Love your sink, and fresh flowers!

name: Torres's
text: Beautiful place, loved the decoration and very clean.

name: Zac
text: Great home with wonderful vibes. Savannah has a true novel. We enjoyed every bit of our journey.

name: Scott
text: Excellently stocked, cleaned, and laid out. Beautifully decorated and very comfortable overall. Thank you for a great stay!

name: Kay
text: Wonderful Home! We loved being here!

name: Haley
text: Excellent Home - Loved it very much!

name: Mark
text: Thank you so much! We had a great time...

name: Joan
text: Thank you for being such a super host! You were so helpful and I love your home. Its Beautiful.

name: English's
text: Beautiful place. Very tastefully decorated. We will be back.

name: Daniel
text: Great Service! Loved my time here. Thank you for a clean & cozy home and a awesome experience.

name: Brandon
text: Fantastic place! Loved the amenities and great decor! and the plants!

name: Riley
text: Beautiful home! It was so clean and lovely.

name: Alicia
text: Beautiful home! Great location. Awesome host!

name: Brown's
text: Thank you so very much for an amazing stay. We absolutely LOVE your place. What a fun experience.

name: Reichardt's
text: Thank you for the beautiful, clean and amazing organized house to stay in.

name: Susie
text: Beautiful home is in perfect location! Loved learning the history.

name: Brooke
text: Thank you for being awesome, super responsive and quick to action

name: Salzburg's
text: Beautiful House

name: Rolanda
text: Thank you Travis & Tim for a wonderful stay. The home is gorgeous and the amenities are amazing. Perfect location explore this beautiful city.

name: Carmen
text: Thanks so much for your responsiveness and accommodating our needs. This was a beautiful location.

name: Rachael
text: Thank you! Beautiful house and beautiful city. Home away from home!

name: Ima
text: Thank you for providing the perfect home base for our trip! Your apartment was perfect for our group.

name: Christine
text: This place was awesome! The house was so cute & comfortable! We enjoyed our stay tremendously.

name: Matt
text: Fantastic little place - perfect location. Enjoyed our trip a lot! Great host and wonderful communication!

name: Paula
text: Absolutely beautiful home! Love the location. Thank you for the amenities. Not all Airbnb's do that so it was very appreciated. Nice not to have to buy all that stuff.

name: Aiden
text: Thank you so very much for a fantastic vacation. This was perfect for us.

name: Jim
text: Perfect hosts! Perfect Place! Clean, comfortable and small details = huge deal for guests. Love the fresh flowers, coffee (bonus creamer and picnic basket.) Smart Tv's were a huge bonus! Thanks

name: Saxby's
text: Your place is beautiful. Thanks for all the great stuff. Thank you again.

name: Dan
text: Wonderful stay. We loved how everything was supplied! Thank You. Also thankful to have every room clean & comfortable.

name: Andrea
text: We absolutely loved this place. Thank you for hosting us.

name: Collen
text: Everything we needed for a comfy stay!

name: Lisa
text: Loved the backyard & kitchen. Loved the cushy blankets, beds, pillows & accents.

name: Steve
text: Absolutely wonderful place. - Such attention to details!

name: Grace
text: We so enjoyed our stay!

name: Shelby
text: Amazing home. Beautiful place with super comfy beds. Clean! Thank you for hosting us. We want to come back again soon!

name: Anya
text: Thank you for making a beautiful place to stay. We loved your Savannah home!

name: Adam
text: Thank you for making it feel very homey. I loved the coffee bar.

name: Alli
text: Thank you for opening up your home it is beautiful! The air conditioning was perfect to come home to after a hot day exploring!

name: Dickerson's
text: Awesome place! Everything we needed and wanted! And such great taste! We will definitely recommend your place.

name: Thomas Family
text: Perfect place for a family of 4. Loved the coffee station. Thank you for maintaining such a beautiful home.

name: Alexandria
text: Thank you for maintaining a lovely house. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay!

name: Kirsten
text: Such a great little renovated building! Found everything i needed and the host was so responsive. I would stay here again. (next years summer camp maybe?)

name: Lynne
text: What a beautiful place! Very welcoming - My daughter rented the apartment upstairs so staying was very convenient. We appreciate you reserving the spot for us.

name: Autumn
text: Perfect space for our trip. Loved the amenities.

name: Crystal
text: Loved the space and details. Thank you for the great experience.

name: Norma
text: Beautiful home, perfect location to everything. Thank you for the comfort of your home.

name: Amber
text: Absolutely beautiful space. Loved all of the historical elements. left in the house. Everything we did was walkable.

name: Sarah
text: Wonderful spot. Loved learning about he history of this home. Thank you for sharing it with us! Savannah has a special spot in our hearts.

name: Seema
text: Thank you for a great 1st Airbnb experience!

name: Jacob
text: Loved the home and it was the most comfortable. The hydrangea's and hand written note was a nice touch and very welcoming.

name: Virgil
text: Thank you for going above & beyond.

name: Nikki
text: Thank you for the lovely work you've done here also, for saving us when we locked ourselves out.

name: Halsey's
text: Very nice home. We love the kitchen area and beautiful floors.

name: J
text: Thank you so much! Very well appointed and lovely place to stay, super comfy beds.
